title: Beef Tagine with Algerian Spices
description: A classic French-inspired tagine dish with beef and Algerian spices, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the Magically in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the Beef in batches until browned, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Add the Algerian to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Snappy and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add the Tagine and scrape up any browned bits.
Return the Beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Snappy if desired.
